div.p: Design Spec: Intel-Manual-Grade Technical Reference Constraint: Serve reads without Raft log I/O, ensuring result visibility of all prior commits.
The leader captures the current commitIndex as the version bound. Any data returned must be at least as recent as this index.
Heartbeat success proves majority acknowledgment, preventing stale reads from a deposed leader in a network partition.

ol.li: Serves as the lower bound for linearizability.

div.p: Current lastApplied: 100 Target ReadIndex: 100 STATE: READY
